title: Making Subitems Appear Under Parent Items in Timeline
excerpt:
I’m having issues with making my subitems appear in dashboards under my parent items. 
When i click on the subitems they end up all lumped together in a single category rather than activating under each associated parent…

posts.author: UniceTanAlchemy (Unice Tan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m having issues with making my subitems appear in dashboards under my parent items.
When i click on the subitems they end up all lumped together in a single category rather than activating under each associated parent item:

image2167×1207 111 KB

How do i resolve this issue because i want my timelines and gantt charts to look like this:

image949×207 38.9 KB

Image found on: The Dashboards – Support

posts.author: UniceTanAlchemy (Unice Tan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, i found the solution which was not so obvious at first glance.

Basically you have to group subitems under parent:

image436×718 21.2 KB

Hope this works for anyone who has trouble with this!

posts.author: garethflower (Gareth Flower)
posts.cookedHtml: That doesn’t work for me. If I follow your example, the items are grouped by Group, not the parent.
